title: Method consisting in using at least one vehicle camera to check whether certain elements of the vehicle are in a safe condition before starting off
abstract: The invention concerns a method consisting in using at least one vehicle camera (8, 10, 12) to automatically check whether certain elements of the vehicle (2) are in a safe condition before starting off and in informing the driver of the check results, for example by displaying the check results on the vehicle dashboard.
claims:
Claims 1 . Method consisting in using at least one vehicle camera (8, 10, 12) to automatically check whether certain elements of the vehicle (2) are in a safe condition before starting off and in informing the driver of the check results, for example by displaying the check results on the vehicle dashboard. 2. Method according to claim 1 , consisting in using at least one vehicle camera (8, 10, 12) to carry out measurements of size of the vehicle before starting off. 3. Method according to previous claim, wherein at least one vehicle camera (8, 10, 12) is used to measure the length, the height and/or the width of the vehicle. 4. Method according to claim 2 or 3, consisting in considering the measurements of size of the vehicle (2) when calculating a route. 5. Method according to any previous claim, wherein, each time the vehicle is started, at least one camera (8) moves: - from a rest position to an intermediate position, wherein the captured images serve to check that certain elements of the vehicle are in a safe condition, and preferably to carry out measurements of size of the vehicle (2), and - from the intermediate position to a driving position. 6. Method according to claim 5, wherein said at least one camera (8) move from the intermediate position to the driving position after a predetermined period has elapsed since the camera is in the intermediate position. 7. Method according to claim 5 or 6, wherein, each time the vehicle is started, two cameras (8) move into the intermediate position. 8. Method according to claim 7, wherein the two cameras are foldable side cameras (8). 9. Method according to any previous claim, consisting in using two side cameras (8), a rearview camera (12) and a front view camera (10) to check whether 

 certain elements of the vehicle are in a safe condition, and preferably to carry out measurements of size of the vehicle, before starting off. 10. Method according to any previous claim, wherein said certain elements includes one or more of the following elements: - the rear door locking mechanism, - the wheels, - the vehicle body, - the tires, - the side bars on trailer side, - the lighting (back and/or front), - the suspensions. Method according to any previous claim, wherein the vehicle is a truck including a trailer (6) and at least one vehicle camera is used to measure the height of the trailer (6) for the purpose of adjusting a roof deflector (14).
